name: @kalpak44/plugin-noco-tools
description: NocoBase plugin that connects NocoBase (and its AI employees) to each user's Google account via OAuth. AI employees can read/send/reply to Gmail, list emails by Gmail search query, list calendars (owned + shared), list/create/update/delete events on the primary calendar, list events on shared calendars, and invite attendees. Tools are per-user: every call runs against the caller's own tokens, so User A's AI employee only ever touches User A's mailbox and calendars. Ships a Settings → Connect Google page for the OAuth flow, a public OAuth callback endpoint, transparent access-token refresh via refresh_token, and matching REST endpoints that any HTTP client can call.
